name: Cartoon CatNap
description:
" CatNap is a calming presence for the critters and ensures he and his friends always have the right amount of sleep to jumpstart the morning's play! End of the day, there's nothing CatNap enjoys more than watching his friends sleep soundly."

Sup yall, i made a CatNap character cuz i didnt find any that i really liked....i t ried my best, if theres anything wrong or if theres any feedback please comment them, i greatly appriciate any feedback.
creator: MagicJay
